message.content:
### 1) Does hero look good on mobile?  
Yes, the hero section looks good on mobile. It has a clean layout with clear hierarchy: the clinic name, tagline, and call-to-action (CTA) buttons are prominent, and the text is readable. The use of contrasting colors (pink for CTAs, dark text for headings) enhances visibility, and the social proof (stars, patient count, etc.) is well-placed without cluttering the design.  


### 2) Does mobile menu show nav links properly?  
Yes, the mobile menu displays nav links clearly. The links (Beranda, Tentang, Layanan, etc.) are listed vertically with adequate spacing, making them easy to tap. The clinic logo, phone number, and CTA button are also included, ensuring users can access key actions (e.g., booking, contacting) from the menu.  


### 3) Any visible issues?  
No major visible issues. The design is cohesive, with consistent branding (logo, color scheme) across both the hero and menu. The menu’s “X” close button is clearly visible, and the layout adapts well to mobile screen size. All elements are legible and functional.
